title: Use Consumer Builders for object creation
description: Using Consumer Builders simplifies object creation and configuration, making code more readable and maintainable. This approach reduces boilerplate and helps prevent errors that can occur when setting properties individually. Adopting Consumer Builders leads to cleaner and more consistent code.
recommendation: Adopt Consumer Builder patterns for constructing and configuring objects instead of setting properties one by one.

checks.message: Adopt Consumer Builder patterns for constructing and configuring objects instead of setting properties one by one.
